zh.lifeSummary: 當Genillin ap Rhys "Gôch"於1100年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾塔爾加斯時，他的父親Rhys Goch ap Maenyrch of Talgarth31歲，母親Joan Cadwgon31歲。他於大約1131年與Janet verch Hywel of Brecon在威爾士布雷康史爾可利可維爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Genillin ap Rhys "Gôch"于1100年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾塔爾加斯时，他的父亲Rhys Goch ap Maenyrch of Talgarth31岁，母亲Joan Cadwgon31岁。他于大约1131年与Janet verch Hywel of Brecon在威尔士布雷康史爾可利可維爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

nameMeanings.name: "Gôch"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Genillin ap Rhys "Gôch" was born in 1100, in Talgarth, Breconshire, Wales, his father, Rhys Goch ap Maenyrch of Talgarth, was 31 and his mother, Joan Cadwgon, was 31. He married Janet verch Hywel of Brecon about 1131, in Crickhowell, Breconshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Genillin ap Rhys "Gôch" est né en 1100, à Talgarth, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Rhys Goch ap Maenyrch of Talgarth, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Cadwgon, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Janet verch Hywel of Brecon environ 1131, à Crickhowell, Breconshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Genillin ap Rhys "Gôch" 1100 in Talgarth, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rhys Goch ap Maenyrch of Talgarth 31 und seine Mutter Joan Cadwgon 31. Er hat um 1131 in Crickhowell, Breconshire, Wales Janet verch Hywel of Brecon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Genillin ap Rhys "Gôch" è nato il nel 1100 nel Talgarth, Breconshire, Galles, il suo padre, Rhys Goch ap Maenyrch of Talgarth, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Cadwgon, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Janet verch Hywel of Brecon circa 1131, nel Crickhowell, Breconshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Genillin ap Rhys "Gôch"が1100年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアタルガースで生まれた時，父Rhys Goch ap Maenyrch of Talgarthは31歳，母Joan Cadwgonは31歳であった。約1131年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアクリックhオウエルでJanet verch Hywel of Breconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Genillin ap Rhys "Gôch"(이)가 1100년 웨일스 브레콘실르 탤가스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhys Goch ap Maenyrch of Talgarth(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Cadwgon(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1131년 웨일스 브레콘실르 크릭호월에서 Janet verch Hywel of Brecon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Genillin ap Rhys "Gôch" nasceu em 1100, em Talgarth, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Rhys Goch ap Maenyrch of Talgarth, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Cadwgon, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet verch Hywel of Brecon aproximadamente 1131, em Crickhowell, Breconshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Genillin ap Rhys "Gôch" родился в 1100 г. в местности талгарт, брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Rhys Goch ap Maenyrch of Talgarth было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Cadwgon, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet verch Hywel of Brecon около 1131 г. в местности криккхоуелл, брекуншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Genillin ap Rhys "Gôch" nació en 1100, en Talgarth, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Rhys Goch ap Maenyrch of Talgarth, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan Cadwgon, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Janet verch Hywel of Brecon aproximadamente 1131, en Crickhowell, Breconshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos.
